## Problem

What use case is currently not well-supported? Be concrete.

## Proposed solution

How would you like this to work? API sketch is welcome:

```php
// example
```

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds have you tried? Why are they insufficient?

## Additional context

Links to relevant standards (RFC 7519, JWA, etc.), issues, or prior art.
